framework.name: Human-in-the-Loop Authorization Thresholds
framework.description: Design pattern where agent autonomy pauses at defined thresholds (transaction amounts, customer data access, compliance implications, production operations) requiring human approval before proceeding. Balances automation with control over high-stakes decisions.
framework.raw_quote: Define clear escalation thresholds where agent autonomy pauses for human approval: financial transactions above a certain amount, actions that affect customer data, decisions with compliance implications, and operations in production environments.
